mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT TOP 500 itfl.Seq , Row_Number() OVER (order by itfl.Version ASC, itfl.LastUpdated ASC, itfl.FltpCode ASC, itfl.FileRealName ASC) AS RNUM ,0 as CHK ,itfl.DocumentID ,itfl.DocCategory ,itfl.LinkType ,itfl.FileName ,itfl.FltpCode ,itfl.FileFormat ,itfl.FileRealName ,itfl.FileSize ,itfl.FileMgt ,itfl.RegMemberID ,itfl.RefFileID ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,itfl.CreationTime),21) as CreationTime ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,itfl.LastUpdated),21) as LastUpdated ,itfl.LastUser ,ISNULL(itfl.Version,TCS.Version) AS Version ,itfl.DownCNT ,ISNULL(mbr.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(mbr.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(mbr.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS WriteUserNM
,fltp.FilePath+itfl.FileName as SysFile ,fltp.FilePath+itfl.FileRealName as OrigFile ,fltp.FilePath ,itfl.FilePath as ExtFileURL
,td.Name as FltpName
,TIC.FileOption AS fileOption ,ti2.ItemTypeCode As ItemTypeCode ,( select t2.name from XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER t1 left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT t2 on t1.teamId = t2.teamId where t1.memberId = itfl.RegMemberID and t2.LanguageID = #{languageID} ) as TeamName
,ISNULL(TIPT.Path, '') + '/' + +ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS Path
,TIA1.PlainText +'/'+TIA2.PlainText AS Path
,TIA3.PlainText +'/'+TIA4.PlainText AS Path
, XBOLTADM.fn_getMyAbsPathForProject(itfl.ProjectID, #{languageID}) AS Path
,ISNULL(TIPT2.Path, '') + '/' +ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS Path
, Case fltp.DocCategory When 'SR' Then SR.SRCode Else SCR.SCRCode End AS DocCode
,ti2.ClassCode ,TL.LanguageCode ,CASE WHEN itfl.Blocked != 0 then 'Y' ELSE '-' END Blocked ,ISNULL(TDF.Name,'') AS FileStatus ,ISNULL(TCS.Version, '-') AS CSVersion FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE itfl LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER mbr ON itfl.RegMemberID = mbr.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP fltp ON itfl.FltpCode = fltp.FltpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY td ON itfl.FltpCode = td.TypeCode AND td.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ti2 On ti2.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And ti2.Deleted = 0 Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP ON TP.ProjectID = itfl.ProjectID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_LANGUAGE TL On TL.LanguageID = itfl.LanguageID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS On TCS.ChangeSetID = itfl.ChangeSetID
Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST SR on itfl.DocumentID = SR.SRID and itfl.DocCategory = 'SR' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 on SR.SRArea1 = TIA1.ItemID and TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 on SR.SRArea2 = TIA2.ItemID and TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_MST SCR on itfl.DocumentID = SCR.SCRID and itfl.DocCategory = 'SCR' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 on SCR.SCRArea1 = TIA3.ItemID and TIA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA4 on SCR.SCRArea2 = TIA4.ItemID and TIA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT ON TIPT.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT2 ON TIPT2.ItemID = itfl.ItemID And TIPT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDF ON itfl.Blocked = TDF.TypeCode AND TDF.languageID = #{languageID} And TDF.Category = 'FILESTS' Left OUter Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON TIC.ItemClassCode = ti2.ClassCode order by itfl.LastUpdated DESC, itfl.FltpCode ASC, itfl.FileRealName ASC ) TC WHERE DocumentID IN ( SELECT T1.ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM T1 WHERE FromItemID IN ( SELECT ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'ST1' UNION ALL SELECT #{s_itemID} ) AND CategoryCode = 'ST1' ) order by TC.RNUM DESC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TOP 500 itfl.Seq , Row_Number() OVER (order by itfl.Version ASC, itfl.LastUpdated ASC, itfl.FltpCode ASC, itfl.FileRealName ASC) AS RNUM ,0 as CHK ,itfl.DocumentID ,itfl.DocCategory ,itfl.LinkType ,itfl.FileName ,itfl.FltpCode ,itfl.FileFormat ,itfl.FileRealName ,itfl.FileSize ,itfl.FileMgt ,itfl.RegMemberID ,itfl.RefFileID ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,itfl.CreationTime),21) as CreationTime ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,itfl.LastUpdated),21) as LastUpdated ,itfl.LastUser ,ISNULL(itfl.Version,TCS.Version) AS Version ,itfl.DownCNT ,ISNULL(mbr.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(mbr.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(mbr.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS WriteUserNM
,fltp.FilePath+itfl.FileName as SysFile ,fltp.FilePath+itfl.FileRealName as OrigFile ,fltp.FilePath ,itfl.FilePath as ExtFileURL
,td.Name as FltpName
,TIC.FileOption AS fileOption ,ti2.ItemTypeCode As ItemTypeCode ,( select t2.name from XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER t1 left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT t2 on t1.teamId = t2.teamId where t1.memberId = itfl.RegMemberID and t2.LanguageID = #{languageID} ) as TeamName
,ISNULL(TIPT.Path, '') + '/' + +ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS Path
,TIA1.PlainText +'/'+TIA2.PlainText AS Path
,TIA3.PlainText +'/'+TIA4.PlainText AS Path
, XBOLTADM.fn_getMyAbsPathForProject(itfl.ProjectID, #{languageID}) AS Path
,ISNULL(TIPT2.Path, '') + '/' +ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS Path
, Case fltp.DocCategory When 'SR' Then SR.SRCode Else SCR.SCRCode End AS DocCode
,ti2.ClassCode ,TL.LanguageCode ,CASE WHEN itfl.Blocked != 0 then 'Y' ELSE '-' END Blocked ,ISNULL(TDF.Name,'') AS FileStatus ,ISNULL(TCS.Version, '-') AS CSVersion FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE itfl LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER mbr ON itfl.RegMemberID = mbr.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP fltp ON itfl.FltpCode = fltp.FltpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY td ON itfl.FltpCode = td.TypeCode AND td.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ti2 On ti2.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And ti2.Deleted = 0 Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP ON TP.ProjectID = itfl.ProjectID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_LANGUAGE TL On TL.LanguageID = itfl.LanguageID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS On TCS.ChangeSetID = itfl.ChangeSetID
Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST SR on itfl.DocumentID = SR.SRID and itfl.DocCategory = 'SR' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 on SR.SRArea1 = TIA1.ItemID and TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 on SR.SRArea2 = TIA2.ItemID and TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_MST SCR on itfl.DocumentID = SCR.SCRID and itfl.DocCategory = 'SCR' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 on SCR.SCRArea1 = TIA3.ItemID and TIA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA4 on SCR.SCRArea2 = TIA4.ItemID and TIA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} and TIA4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT ON TIPT.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT2 ON TIPT2.ItemID = itfl.ItemID And TIPT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = itfl.DocumentID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDF ON itfl.Blocked = TDF.TypeCode AND TDF.languageID = #{languageID} And TDF.Category = 'FILESTS' Left OUter Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON TIC.ItemClassCode = ti2.ClassCode order by itfl.LastUpdated DESC, itfl.FltpCode ASC, itfl.FileRealName ASC ) TC WHERE DocumentID = #{s_itemID} order by TC.RNUM DESC
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(Seq)+1,'1') AS FILEID_NEXTVAL FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE

SELECT tif.FileName as filename , tif.FileRealName as original , ISNULL(tft.FilePath,tif.FilePath) + tif.FileName as downFile , ISNULL(tft.FilePath,tif.FilePath) AS FilePath FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE tif Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP tft On tif.FltpCode = tft.FltpCode WHERE tif.Seq = #{Seq}
SELECT FilePath FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP WHERE FltpCode = #{fltpCode}
SELECT AuthorID, Blocked, Status, LockOwner, ItemTypeCode, ClassCode, ProjectID, CurChangeSet FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ItemID = #{itemId}

SELECT Distinct TIC.ItemTypeCode As ItemTypeCode, TD.Name As ItemTypeName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TIC.ItemTypeCode And TD.LanguageID = #{LanguageID} Where ItemClassCode In (select distinct ItemClassCode From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC)

Select Distinct TFA.FltpCode AS FltpCode, TD.Name As FltpName, (Select ItemTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS Where ItemClassCode = TFA.ItemClassCode) As ItemTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC TFA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD On TD.TypeCode = TFA.FltpCode And TD.LanguageID = #{LanguageID}
Select Name As FltpName From XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY Where TypeCode= #{fltpCode} And LanguageID = #{LanguageID}

Select TIF.Seq, ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End As WriterName, TTT.Name AS TeamName, TIF.FltpCode, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TIF.LastUpdated),21) as LastUpdated, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TIF.CreationTime),21) as CreationTime,
Case WHEN TIF.DocCategory = 'ITM' Then XBOLTADM.fn_GetStrItemPath(#{strItemID},#{languageID},TIF.DocumentID,'N','') + '/' + TIA.PlainText ELSE Null END AS Path ,
Case WHEN TIF.DocCategory = 'ITM' Then XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList(TIF.DocumentID, #{languageID}) + '/' + TIA.PlainText ELSE Null END AS Path ,
TIF.Description, TF.FilePath + TIF.FileName As SysFile, TIF.DocumentID As DocumentID , TIF.FileName, TIF.FileRealName, TF.FilePath, TD.Name As FltpName , TP.ProjectID, TP.RefPjtID As ParentID, TPT1.Name AS ProjectName, TPT2.Name As CsrName , TIF.FileMgt As FileMgt, TF.RevisionYN, TI.Blocked AS ItemBlocked, TIF.DocCategory, TP.Status AS PjtStatus , TIF.Blocked , TIF.ItemID , TI.ClassCode , ISNULL(TCS.Version, '-') AS CSVersion , TCS.ChangeSetID , TIF.FilePath AS ExtFileURL , ISNULL(TIF.RefFileID, TIF.seq) RefFileID From XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TIF Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM On TM.MemberID = TIF.RegMemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TTT.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TIF.DocumentID And TIA.languageID = #{languageID} And TIa.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIF.DocumentID = TIA.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TF On TF.FltpCode = TIF.FltpCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD On TIF.FltpCode = TD.TypeCode And TD.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIF.DocumentID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP ON TP.ProjectID = TIF.ProjectID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT_TXT TPT1 ON TPT1.ProjectID = TP.RefPjtID And TPT1.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT_TXT TPT2 ON TPT2.ProjectID = TP.ProjectID And TPT2.languageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TIF.ChangeSetID = TCS.ChangeSetID Where TIF.Seq = #{seq}
Select FileID From XBOLTADM.TB_TASK Where FileID = #{Seq}
mapper.update: Update XBOLTADM.TB_TASK Set FileID = NULL Where FileID = #{taskFileID}
mapper.select: Select FltpCode From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC Where ProjectID = #{projectID}
Select Top 1 FltpCode From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC Where ItemClassCode = #{classCode} order by Fltpcode desc;

WITH ItemMaster(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ToItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM.FromItemID = #{itemID} AND ITM.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND (Select Deleted From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = ITM.ToItemID ) != '1' UNION ALL SELECT ITM_L.ToItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM_L, ItemMaster LCTE, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM_L.Deleted != '1' AND ITM_L.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND ITM_L.FromItemID = LCTE.MyItemID AND ITM.ItemID = ITM_L.ToItemID ) , ItemStructure(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{itemID} UNION ALL SELECT MyItemID FROM ItemMaster )
SELECT Distinct Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY ITM.Identifier ) as RNUM , ITM_STR.MyItemID AS MyItemID , ITM.Identifier As Identifier , ATR.PlainText AS ItemName , ITM.ClassCode AS ClassCode , TD2.Name As ItemClassNM , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End As LastUser , Convert(nvarchar(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.LastUpdated),120) AS LastUpdated , TF.DocumentID , TF.Seq , TF.FileRealName , TF.FltpCode , TD.Name As FltpName , ISNULL(TDF.Name,'') AS FileStatus , TL.LanguageCode , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End As RegUserName , TF.DownCNT , TFTP.FilePath+TF.FileName as SysFile , TFTP.FilePath+TF.FileRealName as OrgFile , TFTP.FilePath , TCS.Version , CONVERT(nvarchar(10),CONVERT(datetime,TCS.ValidFrom),120) as ValidFrom , ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( ITM.ItemID, #{languageID}),'') AS ItemPath , TF.FileFormat FROM ItemStructure ITM_STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM ON ITM.CategoryCode = 'OJ' AND ITM.ItemID = ITM_STR.MyItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ATR ON ATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATR.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF ON TF.DocumentID = ITM_STR.MyItemID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM on TF.RegMemberID = TM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD On TD.TypeCode = TF.FltpCode And TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_LANGUAGE TL On TL.LanguageID = TF.LanguageID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFTP ON TFTP.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 ON TD2.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TD2.Category = 'CLS' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON ITM.CurChangeSet = TCS.ChangeSetID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDF ON TF.Blocked = TDF.TypeCode AND TDF.languageID = #{languageID} And TDF.Category = 'FILESTS'
TF.Blocked != 2
AND ITM.ClassCode IN (${classCode})
AND TF.LanguageID = #{selectedLanguageID}
AND TF.FltpCode = #{fltpCode}
AND CONVERT(varchar(10), TF.LastUpdated, 120) BETWEEN #{startLastUpdated} AND #{endLastUpdated}
AND ATR.PlainText Like '%'+#{itemName}+'%'
AND TF.FileRealName Like '%'+#{fileName}+'%'
AND TM.Name Like '%'+#{regUserName}+'%'
ORDER BY Identifier
SELECT FileRealName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE Seq = #{seq}
SELECT DocCategory FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP WHERE FltpCode = #{FltpCode}
SELECT Seq , FileRealName , FltpCode , FilePath FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE Seq in ( ${Seq} )
SELECT FileName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE Seq = #{seq}
SELECT TIC.FileOption FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON TI.ClassCode = TIC.ItemClassCode AND TI.ItemTypeCode = TIC.ItemTypeCode WHERE TI.ItemID = #{itemId}
SELECT FilePath FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE Seq = ${Seq}

SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(LinkType,'') AS uploadYN FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC TFA ON TI.ClassCode = TFA.ItemClassCode WHERE TI.ItemID = #{itemId} AND LinkType is not null
Select FilePath From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP Where FltpCode = #{FltpCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_FILE SET Blocked = CASE Blocked WHEN 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END WHERE Seq IN (${seq})

UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_FILE SET Blocked = 2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TF.DocumentID = TCS.ItemID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP FTP ON FTP.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode AND FTP.RevisionYN = 'Y' WHERE TF.DocumentID = #{itemID} AND TF.ChangeSetID != #{csID} AND TF.Blocked = 0 AND TF.DocCategory = 'ITM'
UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_FILE SET Blocked = 0 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TF.DocumentID = TCS.ItemID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP FTP ON FTP.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode AND FTP.RevisionYN = 'Y' WHERE TF.DocumentID = #{itemID} AND TF.ChangeSetID = #{csID} AND TF.Blocked = 1 AND TF.DocCategory = 'ITM'
UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_FILE SET Blocked = 2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ChangeSetID = #{csID}
mapper.select: SELECT distinct TF.DocCategory AS CODE , TD.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF LEFT Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TF.DocCategory = TD.TypeCode where TD.Category = 'DOCCAT' AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID}

Select TOP 1 RevisionYN From XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF ON TFL.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TF.ChangeSetID = TCS.ChangeSetID AND TF.DocumentID = TCS.ItemID Where TCS.ChangeSetID = #{csID} AND TF.Blocked = 0 GROUP BY RevisionYN
SELECT RevisionYN FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP WHERE FltpCode = #{fltpCode}

SELECT ISNULL(TFP.FilePath,TF.FilePath)+'/'+TF.FileName AS FullFileName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFP ON TF.FltpCode = TFP.FltpCode
ChangeSetID = #{changeSetID}
SELECT Description FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE Seq = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_FILE SET Status = #{status}Status = null, Description = #{description}Description = null , LastUpdated = getDate() , LastUser = #{sessionUserId} WHERE Seq = #{Seq}
mapper.select:
Select TF.Seq , Row_Number() OVER (order by ISNULL(TF.Version,'') ASC, TF.LastUpdated ASC, TF.FltpCode ASC, TF.FileRealName ASC) AS RNUM , TF.DocumentID , TF.DocCategory , TF.LinkType , TF.FileName , TF.FltpCode , TF.FileFormat , TF.FileRealName , TF.FileSize , TF.FileMgt , TF.RegMemberID , TF.RefFileID , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.CreationTime),21) as CreationTime , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.LastUpdated),21) as LastUpdated , TF.LastUser , ISNULL(TF.Version,'') AS Version , TF.DownCNT , TD.Name AS FltpName From XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF
Inner Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_FLTP_ALLOC EFA ON EFA.DocCategory = #{docCategory} And EFA.SpeCode = #{speCode} Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP_ALLOC EFA ON EFA.DocCategory = #{docCategory} And EFA.ItemClassCode = #{itemClassCode} And TF.FltpCode = EFA.FltpCode
Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP FLTP ON FLTP.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.Tb_Dictionary TD ON TD.TypeCode = TF.FltpCode And TD.languageID = #{languageID} Where TF.SEQ = FLTP.TemplateFileID
